title: How soaring crude prices are hitting India: Explained in 10 charts
content: Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East are significantly impacting India's economy. Rising crude oil prices have led to a Rs 3 per litre fuel hike, eroded investor wealth by over Rs 5.85 lakh crore, and pushed the rupee to an all-time low. Foreign investors are also withdrawing funds, while the import bill has surged.

title: ‘My body is little weak’: MS Dhoni’s comment to Raina sparks retirement fears
content: Suresh Raina urged MS Dhoni to play IPL 2027, dismissing concerns about his fitness after CSK's loss.  Fans at Chepauk were emotional, fearing it was Dhoni's last home game.  Despite the defeat, Dhoni's presence and lap of appreciation captivated the crowd, leaving his future uncertain but fueling hope for another season.

title: Petrol, diesel price hike: Congress targets Centre, takes 'inflation man' swipe at PM Modi
content: Fuel prices have seen their second hike in less than a week, with petrol and diesel increasing by approximately 90 paise per litre. This follows a nearly four-year freeze by state-run oil companies, with prices now reaching their highest levels since May 2022. Opposition parties allege the freeze was timed to end after state elections.

title: Meta staff say morale is 'historically low' before May 20 layoffs
content: Meta employees face a bleak outlook with impending layoffs of nearly 8,000 staff.  Mandatory tracking software, reduced pay, forced transfers, and a sense of broken trust have created widespread discontent.  While AI researchers are reportedly thriving, most workers are left in anxious anticipation, hoping for severance packages.

title: Ishan Kishan’s whistle taunt at Chepauk crowd goes viral after SRH beat CSK - Watch
content: Ishan Kishan's brilliant 70 powered Sunrisers Hyderabad into the playoffs, defeating Chennai Super Kings. After a match-winning performance, Kishan engaged with the home crowd with a celebratory gesture. He revealed his innings was motivated by his cousin's presence, who was there during a difficult family time. The wicketkeeper-batter emphasized his goal to finish the game for his family.

title: Anthropic CEO makes a 'doomsday' prediction for software companies
content: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei told WSJ at the World Economic Forum in Davos that software is heading toward being "cheap, maybe essentially free," warning that whole careers built around writing code may not survive the AI shift. The Anthropic chief executive also predicted SaaS incumbents leaning on code complexity as a moat could "go bust" as ServiceNow, Snowflake and Microsoft stocks slide and Anthropic eyes a $900 billion valuation.

title: Father pushed Twisha into glamour world, gave weight-loss pills in childhood
content: Twisha Sharma's mother-in-law, a retired judge, claims Twisha underwent a medical termination of pregnancy and had estrangement from her parents. She also alleged Twisha was undergoing psychiatric treatment. Twisha's father, however, suspects murder and demands a fresh post-mortem, accusing his son-in-law of drug addiction.

title: 'Baseless': Centre rejects rumours over turning temple gold into reserve
content: The government has firmly refuted widespread rumors about a plan to monetize gold held by temples and religious institutions. Asserting that such claims are "completely false" and "without any basis," officials clarified that no scheme is being prepared to convert temple gold into bonds or designate it as "Strategic Gold Reserves.

title: Project 2027 World Cup: Big calls expected on Kohli, Rohit, Jadeja's future
content: While the selectors will pick squads for a one-off Test and three ODIs against Afghanistan, the blueprint for the 2027 ODI World Cup will be finalised on May 19. There are no question marks over Virat Kohli's position but Rohit Sharma is on a sticky wicket, and Ravindra Jadeja needs to punch above his weight to remain in contention.

title: Healthcare AI startup CEO shares advice from Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang
content: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's midnight call to Abridge CEO Shiv Rao offered a pivotal leadership lesson: 'fall in love with whatever the job is.' Huang, an investor in Abridge, shared this philosophy, emphasizing that passion can be cultivated. Rao adopted this mindset, embracing unexpected responsibilities like frequent travel, transforming his approach to entrepreneurship and growth.

title: No relief for rupee: Currency slips to 96.38 against US dollar
content: The Indian rupee continued its decline against the US dollar, falling 18 paise to 96.38 amid rising crude oil prices and Middle East tensions. The currency has lost over 5% since late February, with concerns over geopolitical instability and foreign portfolio investor outflows pressuring its value.

title: Iran plans €50mn bounty on 'gambler' Trump, 'child-killer' Netanyahu: Report
content: Iran's parliament is considering hefty financial rewards for assassinating US President Trump and Israeli PM Netanyahu, escalating tensions after recent strikes. Lawmakers aim to formalize bounties, viewing these leaders as responsible for the death of Supreme Leader Khamenei. This move shifts threats from rhetoric to official parliamentary action, with warnings of wider retaliation.

title: Andre Agassi and Steffi Graf net worth 2026: Earnings and investments
content: Steffi Graf and Andre Agassi are a very recognizable tennis pair, and they have an estimated net worth in 2026 of $290 million. They’ve become wealthy by winning Grand Slams, signing multiyear contracts and other investments. Both benefited from the brand equity, business pursuits and financial planning that they developed during and after their successful professional tennis careers.

title: FIFA 2026 controversy erupts as fans slam BTS World Cup song credits
content: Fans are criticizing BigHit Music after BTS was reportedly credited on Jungkook’s solo FIFA World Cup song Dreamers. Many argued that Jungkook alone created and performed the track, calling the move unfair to his solo achievements. The backlash grew amid fresh buzz about BTS potentially performing at the 2026 FIFA World Cup halftime show, reigniting conversations about solo recognition, group branding, and BigHit’s marketing strategy surrounding Jungkook’s global success.

title: Aaron Rodgers not spotted with wife despite Steelers buzz and rumors
content: Aaron Rodgers, the NFL veteran, recently signed a one year deal with the Pittsburgh Steelers, as retirement rumors dominated the headlines, sparking chaos among millions of fans. Amid all the speculations, the spotlight remains on Aaron Rodgers’ wife even as he continues to maintain privacy about his marital life. Through all of this, a picture of Aaron Rodgers with a woman has convinced millions that the identity of his wife has finally been revealed.

title: In God We Trump: MAGA's Project Big MAC (Make America Christian) unfolds on the Mall
content: A recent prayer event in Washington, backed by the White House, has sparked debate about religion and nationalism. Thousands gathered for 'Rededicate 250,' with speakers advocating for America to be a Christian nation. This event highlights a trend of merging American identity with Christianity, a move critics liken to a 'Make America Christian' project.

title: Fuel prices rise again: How much does petrol and diesel cost in your city today
content: Fuel prices surged again Tuesday, with petrol and diesel rising by approximately 90 paise per litre, marking the second increase in under a week. This follows a significant Rs 3 per litre hike last Friday. Despite global crude oil price jumps and ongoing Middle East tensions impacting import costs, officials assure adequate fuel reserves and normal refinery operations.

title: ‘I felt blessed’: Ishan Kishan dedicates playoff-clinching knock to grieving cousin - Watch
content: Ishan Kishan's match-winning 70 against Sunrisers Hyderabad was fueled by a personal tragedy, as he aimed to finish the game for his grieving cousin present in the stands.  Despite a challenging Chepauk pitch, Kishan's composed innings anchored SRH's chase, securing their playoff spot. He felt a sense of power, dedicating the victory to his family.

title: Heavy rain triggers severe waterlogging in Bengaluru; flight schedules affected
content: Bengaluru experienced heavy rain, thunder, and lightning on Monday evening, causing severe waterlogging and massive traffic jams across multiple areas. The downpour disrupted peak-hour commutes, leaving many stranded as roads and underpasses submerged. Flight schedules to and from the city were also impacted due to the adverse weather.

title: Oil prices slip: Crude prices fall over 2% after Trump calls for diplomacy with Iran
content: Oil prices dipped Tuesday as President Trump announced a pause on planned attacks against Iran, opening doors for potential talks. This development comes amid ongoing Middle East tensions that have disrupted the crucial Strait of Hormuz, impacting global supply. Consequently, fuel prices in India saw another hike, with petrol and diesel rates increasing significantly.

title: One last time in yellow? Dhoni leaves Chepauk emotional after SRH defeat - Watch
content: Sunrisers Hyderabad defeated Chennai Super Kings at Chepauk. Fans remained long after the match. They hoped to see MS Dhoni one last time. Dhoni did not play due to fitness. His presence held significance beyond cricket. The crowd showed gratitude for his contributions. The possibility of his final appearance left many emotional.

title: After her husband left, this Kalyan mother drives a rickshaw 16 hours daily for daughter’s dream
content: Komal Dyandew Gaikwad, a 25-year-old single mother, drives an autorickshaw for nearly 16 hours daily in Kalyan to support her three-year-old daughter, Tejaswi. Her daughter accompanies her in a specially made seat, as Komal works tirelessly to ensure Tejaswi receives an education and achieves her dream of becoming an IPS officer.

title: Top shares to buy or sell: Stock market recommendations for today - check list
content: Stock market recommendations: Bajaj Finserv, and Tata Elxsi are the top stocks to buy as per Somil Mehta, Head of Retail Research at Mirae Asset ShareKhan’s recommendation for May 19, 2026. The expert has identified TVS Motor Company as a sell call:

title: At 43.4°C, Delhi records hottest day of season; IMD predicts temperature may hit 45°C
content: Delhi experienced its highest maximum temperature of the season on Monday, with several areas exceeding 44°C. The India Meteorological Department has issued a yellow alert for heatwave conditions, forecasting temperatures to reach 45°C by Friday. Maximum temperatures are expected to rise by approximately 2°C over the next two days.

title: Fuel prices hiked second time in a week: Petrol, diesel prices increased by around 90 paise
content: Fuel prices have seen another surge, with petrol and diesel rates climbing by approximately 90 paise per litre on Tuesday. This marks the second increase in less than a week, pushing petrol prices in Delhi to Rs 98.64 and diesel to Rs 91.58.

title: Dalit BSc student kills self after caste-based assault in Uttar Pradesh
content: A Dalit student's alleged suicide in Firozabad follows accusations of harassment, a caste-based assault, and humiliation at a library.  His family reported visible injuries and a fractured finger. Police have arrested three individuals and are pursuing others named in the FIR, which includes charges under the SC/ST Act.

title: Noida woman dies 18 months after wedding; family says she faced constant dowry torture
content: A 24-year-old woman died at her in-laws' home in Greater Noida, with her family alleging murder over dowry demands. Police have arrested her husband and father-in-law, while other family members are absconding. The family claims she was harassed and assaulted before her death, which was reported as a suicide.

title: IPL Playoff Scenarios: With 7 matches to go, SRH and GT qualify; final spot up for grabs
content: With seven games left, Royal Challengers Bangalore, Gujarat Titans, and Sunrisers Hyderabad have secured playoff spots. Lucknow Super Giants and Mumbai Indians are out. Rajasthan Royals are in a strong position. Punjab Kings, Kolkata Knight Riders, Delhi Capitals, and Chennai Super Kings have slim hopes. The race for the remaining spots is intense with many possible outcomes.

title: Ghosts or clues? Ahmedabad cops chase eerie leads to crack murders
content: Ahmedabad crime branch is now systematically collecting local ghost stories, believing they can lead to undetected murders. This approach has already cracked two cases, including a man buried under his kitchen platform and a woman's remains found 34 years later.

title: Himanta's wife passport row: Congress MP Randeep Surjewala summoned by Assam police on Saturday
content: In a notable escalation, Congress leader Randeep Singh Surjewala has received a summons to report to Guwahati on May 23 as part of the Assam crime branch's investigation into a controversial passport matter involving Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma’s wife. This comes after Pawan Khera faced scrutiny related to her passport and citizenship claims.

title: Defence boost: US clears Apache, M777 support deals for India worth over $428m
content: India is set to receive significant US support for its Apache attack helicopters and M777 howitzers, with deals exceeding $428 million approved by the US State Department. These packages, routed through Foreign Military Sales, will bolster India's defense capabilities and strategic partnership with Washington, enhancing its readiness against regional threats without altering the military balance.

title: Trump admin extends sanctions waiver on Russian crude oil - what it means for India
content: Earlier today petroleum ministry joint secretary Sujata Sharma said that India will continue importing Russian crude based on commercial practicality and its energy security requirements, regardless of whether US sanctions waivers are in place.

title: Don’t allow bulldozer culture to enter Maharashtra, this is not UP or Bihar: Bombay HC
content: The Bombay High Court's Aurangabad bench criticized the Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar Municipal Corporation for arbitrarily demolishing properties linked to AIMIM corporator Mateen Patel and resident Hanif Khan. The court noted the violation of Supreme Court guidelines, including the mandatory 15-day notice period, and stated the action rendered families homeless.

title: Bengal govt approves prosecution of former RG Kar principal in graft case
content: West Bengal authorities have approved the prosecution of former R G Kar Medical College principal Sandip Ghosh over alleged financial irregularities. This development follows a high-profile case involving a trainee doctor's rape and murder at the institution.

title: Madhav Tiwari: ‘Ziddi’ boy who only wanted to bat, but became a match-winner with the ball
content: Delhi Capitals youngster Madhav Tiwari has made an impressive start to his IPL 2026 journey, delivering impactful performances in his first two matches. The 22-year-old contributed with both bat and ball in crucial wins against Punjab Kings and Rajasthan Royals. But behind Madhav’s rise is the story of a stubborn youngster who only wanted to bat before former India cricketer Amay Khurasiya pushed him towards bowling as well. Today, that decision is helping Madhav emerge as an important player for Delhi Capitals in pressure situations.

title: NFL trade rumours: Chicago Bears, Los Angeles Chargers eye Patriots WR
content: NFL trade rumors around New England Patriots WR Kayshon Boutte are gaining momentum after fresh offseason developments raised questions about his future. With the Chicago Bears and Los Angeles Chargers still needing wide receiver depth, the former LSU star could become an affordable trade target on his $4.02 million rookie contract. ESPN analyst Mike Reiss’ latest report involving Romeo Doubs added more fuel to the speculation. Here is why Boutte’s situation in New England suddenly looks uncertain and why both the Bears and Chargers make strong landing spots before the 2026 NFL season begins.

title: Elon Musk loses $150 billion OpenAI lawsuit; jury says he sued too late
content: Elon Musk has lost his $150 billion lawsuit against OpenAI. A nine-person Oakland jury has unanimously cleared OpenAI, Sam Altman, Greg Brockman and Microsoft in Elon Musk's $150 billion lawsuit, ruling the Tesla CEO sued too late. Judge Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers dismissed the case on the spot. Musk had accused them of "stealing a charity" he co-founded in 2015. The verdict clears OpenAI's path to a planned $1 trillion IPO.

title: Apache Choppers, Howitzers: US Clears $428-Million Defence Support To India
content: The approvals come amid expanding defence cooperation between India and the United States, which have steadily deepened military ties over the past decade through arms sales, joint military exercises and technology-sharing initiatives.

title: In Twisha Sharma's Post-Mortem, Crucial Evidence Was Missing
content: It was due to this missing piece of crucial evidence that doctors could not match the alleged ligature material with the marks found on Twisha Sharma's neck.

title: "Pushed Into Glamour, Disowned By Parents": Twisha Sharma's Mother-In-law
content: Twisha Sharma was discovered hanging at her husband's house in Bhopal's Katara Hills area on May 12. Originally from Noida, Twisha had entered the world of modelling between 2009 and 2012.

title: Ex-Bengal Sports Minister Named In Complaint By Messi Kolkata Event Organiser
content: The complaint, filed by tour organiser Satadru Dutta, alleges unlawful intrusion into restricted security zones, collapse of perimeter discipline, and endangerment of Messi.

title: Despite Rs 3.9 Fuel Hike, Oil Companies Still Losing Rs 900 Crore Daily
content: Petrol, Diesel Price Today: Just four days after a Rs 3 per litre hike, petrol and diesel prices were raised by another 90 paise on Tuesday morning.

title: PM Modi's Gothenburg Gambit: India Courts European CEOs In Sweden
content: The Gothenburg meeting was not taking place in isolation. It followed a series of landmark developments in India-EU relations, most notably the conclusion of the long-awaited India-EU Free Trade Agreement -- described by officials as the "Mother of a

title: 3 Killed In Shooting At San Diego's Largest Mosque, 2 Teen Suspects Dead
content: The center is the largest mosque in San Diego County and includes the Al Rashid School that offers courses in Arabic language, Islamic studies and the Quran for students ages 5 and up.

title: Iran Plans $58 Million Bounty For "Whoever Sends Trump, Netanyahu To Hell": Reports
content: The Iranian parliament is scheduled to vote on a bill offering rewards for the assassination of Trump and Netanyahu for the February 28 strikes on Tehran that killed the then-supreme leader Ali Khamenei.

title: 7,000 Staff To Shift To AI Roles As Meta Cuts Jobs, Revamps Structure: Report
content: In the memo, Meta Chief People Officer Janelle Gale told employees the company plans to move 7,000 employees to new initiatives related to AI workflows and to eliminate managerial roles.

title: Petrol Diesel Price LIVE Updates: Fuel Prices Up Again, Petrol, Diesel Costlier By Around 90 paise
content: Petrol Diesel Price Hike Live Updates: In Delhi, petrol now costs Rs 98.64 per litre, up from Rs 97.77, while diesel has increased to Rs 91.58 from Rs 90.67. This follows an earlier hike of Rs 3 per litre on Friday.

title: "Wolf In Sheep's Clothing": Twisha Sharma's Father On Her Husband Samarth Singh
content: Twisha Sharma's husband, Samarth Singh, and his mother, Giribala Singh, a retired judge, have been accused of murder and dowry harassment. On the question of dowry, Navnidhi Sharma described indirect pressures "common" in such cases.

title: US Iran War News Live Updates: Trump Holds Off Iran Attack Planned For Tuesday After Gulf Intervention
content: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.

title: Squadron Leader Saanya Becomes IAF's 1st Woman Cat-A Flying Instructor
content: The Indian Air Force, in a post on X, said it marks a proud milestone for the IAF and is an inspiration for aspiring aviators across the nation.

title: U.S. nod to possible sale of support services for India’s Apache helicopters, M777A2 howitzers
content: The possible sale of support services for the helicopters and the howitzers will take place under the Foreign Military Sale channels

title: A.P. targets 45 MSME clusters under Cluster Development Programme, aims to generate 7,032 jobs
content: Programme expected to benefit 1,688 MSME units and create employment for 7,032 people by 2030; Common Facility Centres planned across three economic regions

title: Hope PM Modi will use channels to Russia to help bring ceasefire in Ukraine: Norway PM Store
content: Speaking to Indian journalists, Mr. Store says he hopes India will put “pressure” on Russia by cutting oil imports

title: Woman ends life over dowry harassment in Greater Noida; husband, in-law held
content: Deepika got married to Hrithik around a year and a half ago; woman’s family allege she was killed over “a Fortuner car and cash”

title: Petrol, diesel prices hiked 90 paise per litre in second hike within a week
content: The steepest hike in the price of the two retail fuels has been observed in Kolkata, that is, in comparison to peers Delhi, Mumbai and Chennai

title: After Netherlands, MEA faces questions over PM’s decision not to hold press conference in Norway
content: MEA Secretary (West) Sibi George defends policy, says India’s constitution guarantees press freedoms, democracy and human rights

title: Three coaches of Ujjaini Express derail near Rishikesh, no casualties
content: There were no passengers on board when the incident occurred around 9:40 p.m. close to the Yog Nagri railway station

title: ‘World sees compromised PM panic’: Rahul slams Modi for ‘not taking’ Norwegian journalist’s questions
content: The Congress leader made these remarks on X, while sharing a video of a journalist in Norway, where Mr. Modi was seen walking away as she tried to ask a question.

title: Uttar Pradesh plans recruitment of 10,000 new teachers to enhance education
content: Requisition for 10,000 new teachers has been sent to the Education Service Selection Commission: Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath

title: K. Surendran’s post on Kasaragod ministerial snub triggers political debate
content: He said the district deserved a ministerial berth and termed the denial of a Cabinet position to Mr. Ashraf as “deeply painful”, particularly after his emphatic electoral victory over Manjeswaram

title: IIT-M invites applications for web-enabled programmes
content: The entrance exams are scheduled for June and July and selected candidates will start their academic sessions in August or September

title: Bengaluru: Rains again throw normal life out of gear
content: The maximum temperature at Bengaluru city was 34℃, at HAL Airport and KIA, the maximum temperature was 34.4℃ and 35℃ respectively

title: Court denies pre-arrest bail to Bhopal lawyer wanted for wife's death; cops declare bounty for info
content: During the tense courtroom hearing, Samarth’s counsel opposed arrest by raising questions about Twisha’s mental health, a statement that was strongly countered by the deceased woman’s family lawyer

title: Haryana suspends four doctors over poor monitoring of sex ratio measures
content: Additional Chief Secretary (Health) Sumita Misra directed all districts to significantly increase raids and inspections against illegal sex determination activities and strengthen surveillance mechanisms to identify and curb violations at the ground level

title: The politics of family affairs in the new Kerala Cabinet
content: Several members of the V.D. Satheesan Cabinet which took charge on May 18 come with strong family legacies in Kerala politics

title: Citizens continue protests against proposed felling of 45,000 mangrove trees in Mumbai for Coastal Road project
content: Citizen volunteer-led group continue to protest and question the felling of 45,000 mangroves for the second phase of the Mumbai Coastal Road project which aims to connect suburbs Versova and Bhayandar

title: NTK will go it alone in the next Lok Sabha elections: Seeman
content: Seeman urged his party cadre not to get disheartened by the recent Assembly election results, which saw the party’s vote share drop by 50

title: Veteran AIADMK leader Semmalai quits party
content: Speaking to reporters in Salem, Mr. Semmalai, considered a strong supporter of Mr. Palaniswami, said currently, senior leaders are unable to develop the AIADMK; without a clear plan to strengthen the party, it is impossible to save it

title: Census 2027: Over 11 lakh households in Maharashtra complete self-enumeration
content: Among districts, Pune recorded the highest number of households completing self-enumeration at 1,53,568, followed by Mumbai Suburban with 1,21,068, Thane with 1,16,512, Mumbai city with 61,295 and Nashik with 52,667

title: From green shipping to blue economy: Modi hails India-Norway partnership
content: India and Norway upgrade ties to a “Green Strategic Partnership”; Norway PM Støre says both countries have “differences”, calls for them to unite against weaponization of diplomacy, trade and technology

title: Dubare tragedy: State imposes 100-ft safety buffer around elephants
content: As part of the immediate measures, tourists will not be permitted to approach elephants under any circumstances.

title: CAA applicants must declare passport status, surrender foreign passports: Home Ministry
content: Home Ministry notifies amendment to Citizenship Rules; move comes days after BJP came to power for the first time in West Bengal where a large number of Matua community, the intended beneficiaries of CAA legislation reside

title: Karnataka reinforces rules for sale of petrol and diesel; rationing reports spark confusion
content: Staff at several petrol bunks told The Hindu that they had not received any directives from their management regarding fuel rationing

title: KSRTC warns employees against joining indefinite strike from May 20
content: According to the circular, employees working in transport corporations are barred from resorting to strikes under the provisions of the Act

title: U.S. Justice Department drops all charges against Gautam Adani; case closed permanently
content: The case turned in Adani’s favour after prosecutors found no clear U.S. linkages and insufficient evidence to sustain the allegations, according to people familiar with the matter

title: Karnataka may face fertilizer shortage during kharif season: Cheluvarayaswamy
content: He said that the State had been bracing for a potential shortage of fertilizers in the 2026 kharif season, as supplies were being adversely affected ahead of the monsoon

title: Church bodies offer to broker Kuki-Naga peace in Manipur
content: Leaders of two church organisations meet Chief Minister Yumnam Khemchand Singh in a bid to end the conflict between the two communities in the State

title: Maharashtra Congress to hold training camp for 7,000 office-bearers
content: The training programme is intended to familiarise new functionaries with party organisation, election procedures, and administrative responsibilities

title: Bombay High Court quashes Maharashtra GRs on school disqualification
content: The Bombay High Court, at its Kolhapur bench, on April 29 ordered that two government resolutions (GRs) issued on April 1 and April 2 are not applicable to the petitioner schools

title: Dindoshi sessions court denies anticipatory bail to grandfather in child assault case
content: The court said the accused may flee or tamper with evidence, and placed the welfare of the child victim above other considerations

title: Olympian Jennifer Paes, Leander's mother passes away
content: Jennifer Paes was the great-great-granddaughter of noted Bengali poet and dramatist Michael Madhusudan Dutt

title: West Bengal Police reopens 59 cases linked to 2021 post-poll violence, registers 181 fresh FIRs
content: Multiple Trinamool leaders come under the police crackdown as many face arrests in corruption and post-poll violence charges

title: Who is Abhijeet Dipke? Inside the viral Cockroach Janta Party movement
content: What began as a satirical response to Chief Justice of India Surya Kant’s oral observation has grown into an online movement reflecting youth anger, political satire, and distrust in institutions

title: Address ‘ground level challenges’, ease regulatory frameworks: Norwegian businesses tell Modi
content: At India-Norway Business and Research Summit, Modi, Store discuss enhancing investment, trade in India

title: India is now free from Maoism, says Amit Shah at Bastar
content: Home Minister says the country is largely free from security challenges of Jammu & Kashmir, the Northeast, and Naxalism; he urges the people of Bastar to “accept” about 3,000 surrendered Naxals and help them become part of the mainstream

title: Parliamentary Standing Committee to review the reforms of National Testing Agency
content: The agenda includes a review of the implementation of the K. Radhakrishnan Committee report on NTA reforms, as well as an update on the investigation into the alleged NEET-UG paper leak case

title: Haryana Cabinet clears industrial policy, rules to curb vehicular pollution
content: The policy aims to draw fresh investments worth ₹5 lakh crore, create 10 lakh jobs, and boost the State’s export figures over the next five years

title: Karnataka-Kerala connection: P.C. Vishnunadh’s induction into V.D. Satheesan cabinet brings cheer to people of Tumari in Sagar
content: P.C. Vishnunadh, who took oath as a Minister in the newly sworn-in Kerala government, is married to Ha.Ma. Kanaka, a Kannada poet and native of Haalkere village in Tumari Gram Panchayat
